Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment between Plaintiff Anthony Held and Defendant HMS HOST CORPORATION, HMS HOST USA, INC. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
